title: Win Celebration Plugin Configuration
description: Configuration for the Win Celebration plugin. Place each team's GIF file alongside manager.py and reference it by filename in gif_file. Slots team1–team5 are checked in order; leave abbreviation blank to disable a slot.

abbreviation.description: ESPN team abbreviation (e.g. PIT, CHC, NYY). Leave blank to disable this slot.

gif_file.description: Animated GIF filename. Bundled: jolly-roger.gif (Pirates), fly-the-w.gif (Cubs). Drop any custom GIF alongside manager.py.

win_text.description: Short text overlay when this team wins (e.g. RAISE IT!). Defaults to '<ABBR> WINS!' if blank.

primary_color.description: Team primary color [R, G, B] — used for win text and programmatic fallback animation

secondary_color.description: Team secondary color [R, G, B] — used in programmatic fallback animation

animation_style.description: Programmatic animation when no GIF is loaded. 'skull_crossbones' — pulsing skull-and-crossbones in brand colors (PIT default). 'waving_flag' — color-wave flag with team abbreviation (CHC default). 'team_logo' — team logo from LEDMatrix assets with pulsing brightness (default for all other teams).

team2.description: Team 2 — optional second team to monitor

abbreviation.description: ESPN team abbreviation (e.g. CHC, NYY). Leave blank to disable this slot.

gif_file.description: Animated GIF filename. Bundled: jolly-roger.gif (Pirates), fly-the-w.gif (Cubs).

win_text.description: Short text overlay when this team wins.

animation_style.description: Programmatic animation style when no GIF is loaded: 'waving_flag', 'skull_crossbones', or 'team_logo'.

team3.description: Team 3 — optional third team to monitor

abbreviation.description: ESPN team abbreviation. Leave blank to disable this slot.

win_text.description: Short text overlay when this team wins.

animation_style.description: Programmatic animation style when no GIF is loaded: 'waving_flag', 'skull_crossbones', or 'team_logo'.

team4.description: Team 4 — optional fourth team to monitor

abbreviation.description: ESPN team abbreviation. Leave blank to disable this slot.

win_text.description: Short text overlay when this team wins.

animation_style.description: Programmatic animation style when no GIF is loaded: 'waving_flag', 'skull_crossbones', or 'team_logo'.

team5.description: Team 5 — optional fifth team to monitor

abbreviation.description: ESPN team abbreviation. Leave blank to disable this slot.

win_text.description: Short text overlay when this team wins.

animation_style.description: Programmatic animation style when no GIF is loaded: 'waving_flag', 'skull_crossbones', or 'team_logo'.

celebration_hours.description: How many hours to show the celebration after a win

team_display_duration.description: When multiple teams are celebrating, seconds to show each team's animation before rotating to the next

display_duration.description: How long (in seconds) to show the plugin per rotation slot while celebrating

update_interval.description: How often (in seconds) to poll the ESPN scoreboard API

animation_fps.description: Target FPS for the programmatic fallback animation (GIF frame durations are used when a GIF is loaded)

show_score.description: Overlay the final score on the display

show_text.description: Overlay the win text on the display

font_name.description: Font file to use for text overlays (from assets/fonts directory)

live_priority.description: Take over the display immediately after a win instead of waiting for the normal rotation slot

transition.description: Transition settings when entering/leaving this plugin

simulate_win.description: Simulate a win for testing — activates the celebration immediately. Set back to false to cancel.

simulate_team.description: Team abbreviation to simulate winning (blank = first active slot)

vegas_mode.description: How this plugin appears in Vegas scroll mode
